requirement_topic.en: CNEE / Distributor Grid Connection — 120/240 V, 60 Hz
requirement_topic.zh: CNEE / 配电商并网接入——120/240 V、60 Hz
requirement_topic.zht: CNEE / 配電商併網接入——120/240 V、60 Hz

summary.en: Guatemala's distribution environment follows the Americas 60 Hz system, with low-voltage charging commonly requiring 120/240 V single-phase compatibility and project-specific coordination with CNEE-regulated distributors such as EEGSA and Energuate. Public or commercial charging sites should be treated as electrical installations requiring load study, service-capacity confirmation, protection coordination, metering, grounding, and distributor approval before energization. Where installations affect distribution capacity or power quality, CNEE rules and distributor technical requirements are the practical gate, while regional interconnection context includes the Central American SIEPAC electricity system.
summary.zh: 危地马拉配电环境采用美洲60 Hz体系，低压充电通常需要兼容120/240 V单相，并与受CNEE监管的配电商（如EEGSA和Energuate）进行项目级协调。公共或商业充电站点应按电气安装项目处理，在送电前完成负荷研究、供电容量确认、保护配合、计量、接地和配电商批准。若安装影响配电容量或电能质量，CNEE规则和配电商技术要求即为实务门槛；区域互联背景还包括中美洲SIEPAC电力系统。
summary.zht: 瓜地馬拉配電環境採用美洲60 Hz體系，低壓充電通常需要兼容120/240 V單相，並與受CNEE監管的配電商（如EEGSA和Energuate）進行項目級協調。公共或商業充電站點應按電氣安裝項目處理，在送電前完成負荷研究、供電容量確認、保護配合、計量、接地和配電商批准。若安裝影響配電容量或電能質量，CNEE規則和配電商技術要求即為實務門檻；區域互聯背景還包括中美洲SIEPAC電力系統。

standards_or_laws: CNEE distribution-service and technical rules for Guatemala
Distributor interconnection and service-capacity approval requirements (EEGSA / Energuate as applicable)
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
IEC 61851-1 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — General requirements

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are commonly designed around 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz, GB/T 18487.1-2023 charging-system evidence, GB/T 20234 connectors, GB/T 27930-2023 DC communication, and local Chinese grid-operator project acceptance. That domestic baseline does not prove readiness for Guatemala's 60 Hz, 120/240 V service environment or local distributor approval.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装通常以220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz、GB/T 18487.1-2023充电系统证据、GB/T 20234接口、GB/T 27930-2023直流通信及中国当地电网运营商项目验收为基线。该国内基线不能证明其已适配危地马拉60 Hz、120/240 V供电环境或当地配电商批准要求。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝通常以220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz、GB/T 18487.1-2023充電系統證據、GB/T 20234接口、GB/T 27930-2023直流通訊及中國當地電網運營商項目驗收為基線。該國內基線不能證明其已適配瓜地馬拉60 Hz、120/240 V供電環境或當地配電商批准要求。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters must confirm that the charger input range, control power supply, transformer or rectifier design, protection devices, thermal design, and nameplate ratings cover 120/240 V at 60 Hz or the project-specific supply specified by the Guatemalan distributor. Site documents should include load calculations, single-line diagrams, grounding, metering, harmonic and EMC data, commissioning procedure, and distributor coordination records. A China-only 220/380 V 50 Hz design is not Guatemala grid-ready without electrical redesign or documented wide-range ratings.
gap.zh: 出口商须确认充电桩输入范围、控制电源、变压器或整流器设计、保护器件、热设计及铭牌额定值覆盖120/240 V、60 Hz，或覆盖危地马拉配电商指定的项目供电条件。站点文件应包括负荷计算、单线图、接地、计量、谐波和EMC数据、调试程序及配电商协调记录。仅面向中国220/380 V、50 Hz的设计，若无电气重新设计或宽范围额定值文件，不能视为危地马拉并网就绪。
gap.zht: 出口商須確認充電樁輸入範圍、控制電源、變壓器或整流器設計、保護器件、熱設計及銘牌額定值覆蓋120/240 V、60 Hz，或覆蓋瓜地馬拉配電商指定的項目供電條件。站點文件應包括負荷計算、單線圖、接地、計量、諧波和EMC數據、調試程序及配電商協調記錄。僅面向中國220/380 V、50 Hz的設計，若無電氣重新設計或寬範圍額定值文件，不能視為瓜地馬拉併網就緒。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory at project level — CNEE-regulated distribution connection and distributor service approval apply to grid-connected charging installations; exact studies and documents depend on site capacity, tariff, and distributor
mandatory_status.cn: China local grid operator acceptance applies domestically and is not a CNEE or Guatemala distributor approval substitute; 60 Hz and 120/240 V compatibility must be re-confirmed

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Guatemala grid readiness is a project and electrical-design question. Confirm 120/240 V 60 Hz operation, power-quality data, and distributor approval with CNEE-regulated utilities before shipment or installation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 危地马拉并网就绪属于项目和电气设计问题。出货或安装前，应与受CNEE监管的配电企业确认120/240 V、60 Hz运行能力、电能质量数据及配电商批准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 瓜地馬拉併網就緒屬於項目和電氣設計問題。出貨或安裝前，應與受CNEE監管的配電企業確認120/240 V、60 Hz運行能力、電能質量數據及配電商批准。
